reps.visible_state: Hero folded a thin river bluff-catcher after a tight line, then saw the opponent show a bluff.
reps.learner_prompt: What is the cleaner review before changing your future fold standard?
reps.correct_feedback: Good review. One reveal is data, not proof that the process was wrong.
reps.incorrect_feedback: Regret lets one result rewrite the process too quickly. Re-check the line, price, and opponent before judging.

reps.visible_state: Hero made a loose call, won the pot, and feels tempted to treat the call as confirmed.
reps.learner_prompt: What keeps the review honest after a lucky win?
reps.correct_feedback: Good flag. A good result can still hide a weak process.
reps.incorrect_feedback: Trusting only the result misses the decision cue. Re-check whether the call made sense before the river card helped.
reps.repair_cue: Re-check decision quality even after a win.

reps.visible_state: Hero lost a large pot after getting money in ahead and feels anger before the next hand.
reps.learner_prompt: What protects the next meaningful decision?
reps.correct_feedback: Good reset. A short pause protects the next decision from the last pot.
reps.incorrect_feedback: Forcing action turns one painful result into the next mistake. Re-check your plan before choosing again.

reps.visible_state: Hero made an avoidable mistake last orbit, then faces a small bet with position and a reasonable made hand.
reps.learner_prompt: What should steer the current hand?
reps.correct_feedback: Good anchor. The current seat, hand, board, and price should lead the decision.
reps.incorrect_feedback: Chasing correction lets the last hand steer this one. Re-check the current table signals first.
reps.repair_cue: Re-check the current signal before correcting the last result.

reps.visible_state: An opponent needles Hero, and Hero wants to answer with a thin raise on a marginal spot.
reps.correct_feedback: Good discipline. Confidence means acting when evidence supports it, not answering table noise.
reps.incorrect_feedback: Ego action sounds confident but ignores the table read. Re-check evidence before taking the louder line.

reps.visible_state: Hero reaches a short recap after noisy results, one reset, and one disciplined pass.
reps.learner_prompt: What is the clean next-session focus?
reps.correct_feedback: Good recap. Carry one process cue forward so the next session starts stable.
reps.incorrect_feedback: Chasing score makes the recap too result-heavy. Re-check the one cue that helped decisions stay clean.
reps.repair_cue: Re-check one process cue before the next session.
